name: FitGirl Repacks
description: Okay, So who remembers FitGirl? I’m pretty sure at least once in our life we downloaded a pirated FitGirl repack. Millions of gamers around the world were still able to play the games they loved because FitGirl took the time to compress them, repack them, and share them for free. Entire generations of gamers grew up staring at that installer screen. She’s been repacking games for years - completely free. https://fitgirl-repacks.site/popular-repacks/ is literally pirated-game euphoria. On her official website, under the donate page, she asks for donations in crypto and has a Solana wallet listed. So for this coin, all creator fees will be sent directly to her wallet. FitGirl is a legend in the gaming world and she deserves the fee for the work she been doing for years.
